issues.detail: Data has type '{' (truncated/malformed). TSX defines button as '{ content: React.ReactNode; onClick: () => void } | undefined' — the full inline object type was not captured.
Data lists 'onClick: () => void' as a top-level required prop. In TSX it is a sub-property of the optional 'button' object, not a standalone prop.

Data has two 'content' entries: one required (a flattened sub-prop of 'button') and one optional (the real top-level prop). The required entry is phantom — it does not exist as a top-level prop in TSX.
The second data entry for 'content' is 'required: false', which matches TSX. The first (phantom) entry marks it 'required: true', which is incorrect and confusing.
TSX defines 'children: React.ReactNode' (required). Data props array is empty.
TSX defines 'role: TMessageRole' (required, 'user' | 'assistant' | 'system'). Data props array is empty.
TSX defines 'actions?: BaseMessageAction[]'. Data props array is empty.

description_pairs.data_description: A button component with integrated tooltip functionality, combining Button and ActionTooltip from Gravity UI.
An alert message with an indicator of alert's type opportunity to pass a button
Base wrapper for message with support for rendering action buttons
A fully assembled chat component - the main exportable component of the library that integrates Header, ChatContent, and History.
Main chat content container with view switching between empty state and message list.
A ChatDate component displays formatted dates with time and locale support.
A circular progress indicator that visualizes context usage as a percentage (0-100%).
A compact component that displays diff statistics showing the number of added and deleted lines.
